error.bad_request: The request could not be processed. Please check your input and try again.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.not_found: The requested data could not be found.
error.conflict: The data conflicts with existing records. Please review and try again.
error.validation_error: Validation failed. Please check your input and try again.
error.internal_server_error: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
error.service_unavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
error.bad_gateway: The service could not be reached. Please try again later.
error.gateway_timeout: The request timed out. Please try again later.
error.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.expired_token: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.account_not_linked: This account is not linked yet. Please use another sign-in method.
error.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

logo.size: File size is too large. Maximum 2 MB.

name.min: Company name must be at least 3 characters.
name.max: Company name must not exceed 60 characters.
name.invalid_character: Company name may only contain letters, numbers, periods, and commas.
